nodes.title: About Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.
镜头环绕一个可爱的二次元女孩快速旋转，最后定格在她的面部特写，她骄傲的说道：开源社区终于迎来新基座，让我们欢迎LTX2.3！

Starting from a medium close-up of a graceful young woman in flowing white Hanfu with dark, gold-embroidered lapels, gazing wistfully at two tiny yellow wildflowers she holds against a soft, misty pale-green backdrop. The scene comes to life as a single continuous tracking shot slowly pushes in, capturing the gentle sway of her silver crystal hairpins and loose strands of dark hair stirred by a sudden spring breeze. As she softly rolls the thin green stem between her delicate fingertips, the yellow petals tremble, catching the diffused, ethereal light. Her long eyelashes flutter slightly, and her lower lip parts with a faint, visible breath. Woman (soft, melancholic sigh): "春风虽暖，却留不住这花期。" Following her words, her fingers slowly uncurl, surrendering to the wind. The breeze catches the delicate blossoms, sweeping them gracefully from her grasp. The unbroken camera shifts its focus smoothly from her lingering, downcast eyes to the drifting flowers, tracking them as they swirl through the mist past the rough stone pillar on the right edge of the frame. Eastern fantasy wuxia aesthetic, 35mm anamorphic lens, hyper-realistic silk textures, soft cinematic depth of field, ethereal volumetric lighting.
